en.name: Level 18 — Memories
en.shortDescription: A personalized childhood-memory realm that manifests differently for each visitor, laced with whispering voices and nostalgic imagery.
en.atmosphere: Emotionally evocative and introspective; recreates formative spaces with a melancholy that resurfaces forgotten memories.
en.tips: No physical danger. Simply turn around and leave to reach Level 19. Following the Plush Dino can guide you, though slowly.
